code: import{createAsyncThunk}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';import*as bookShelfAPI from'services/bookshelf-api';export const fetchBooks=createAsyncThunk('books/fetchBooks',async(_,_ref)=>{let{rejectWithValue}=_ref;try{const books=await bookShelfAPI.fetchBooks();return books;}catch(error){return rejectWithValue(error.message);}});
